dsVert 1.1.0
  • Reference

Restore base64 padding from base64url

Source: R/ring127SplinelessDS.R
dot-b64_pad.Rd

Opal DSL parser chokes on =, + and / inside double-quoted string literals. Client converts base64 -> base64url; we restore standard base64 via the already-existing .base64url_to_base64 helper in mpcUtils.R (documented since pre-session as the canonical "Opal/Rock string parameter" workaround).

Usage

.b64_pad(x)

Arguments

x

base64url-encoded string (or NULL / empty).

Value

Standard base64 string with padding restored, or x unchanged if NULL / empty.
